Jeff Duncan-Andrade, founder and board chair of the Roses in Concrete Community School, made the case that equity is everyone's responsibility during his keynote at Carnegie's Summit on Improvement in Education.
If we have academic rigor without social justice, then we have neither.
There is no academic rigor without social justice.
Stay focused on the people who need it most and who have it the least.

Flyboard of Zapata Racing is the new water sport which taking over the world.
Now you can easily take part in it here in Nha Trang, Vietnam.
It is easy: you don't have to be an athlete.
Using the Flyboard is quite similar to riding a self-balancing scooter.
Our instructors will brief and lead you with expertize, so it will take only two to five minutes to get the basics and start to fly confidently or even perform some basic stunts.
